brand.name: FreshCo
brand.guidelines: Tone: upbeat, youthful, energetic. Use vibrant colors. Never use words: 'cheap', 'budget', 'discount'. Always emphasize quality and freshness.

products.name: Citrus Burst Sparkling Water
products.description: Zero-calorie sparkling water with natural citrus flavors, perfect for staying refreshed on hot summer days

products.name: Berry Bliss Smoothie
products.description: Ready-to-drink mixed berry smoothie made with real fruit, ideal for health-conscious consumers on the go

target_audience: Health-conscious millennials and Gen Z, ages 22-35, urban professionals who value wellness and sustainability
campaign_message: Beat the heat with nature's best flavors
